2604.18816.title: Curvature-Aware PCA with Geodesic Tangent Space Aggregation for Semi-Supervised Learning
2604.18816.paper_summary: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is a fundamental tool for representation learning, but its global linear formulation fails to capture the structure of data supported on curved manifolds. In contrast, manifold learning methods model nonlinearity but often sacrifice the spectral structure and stability of PCA. We propose \emph{Geodesic Tangent Space Aggregation PCA (GTSA-PCA)}, a geometric extension of PCA that integrates curvature awareness and geodesic consistency within a unified spectral framework. Our approach replaces the global covariance operator with curvature-weighted local covariance operators defined over a $k$-nearest neighbor graph, yielding local tangent subspaces that adapt to the manifold while suppressing high-curvature distortions. We then introduce a geodesic alignment operator that combines intrinsic graph distances with subspace affinities to globally synchronize these local representations. The resulting operator admits a spectral decomposition whose leading components define a geometry-aware embedding. We further incorporate semi-supervised information to guide the alignment, improving discriminative structure with minimal supervision. Experiments on real datasets show consistent improvements over PCA, Kernel PCA, Supervised PCA and strong graph-based baselines such as UMAP, particularly in small sample size and high-curvature regimes. Our results position GTSA-PCA as a principled bridge between statistical and geometric approaches to dimensionality reduction.
2604.18816.paper_summary_zh: 主成分分析（PCA）是表示學習的一個基本工具，但其全局線性形式無法捕捉在曲面流形上支持的數據結構。相對而言，流形學習方法建模非線性，但往往犧牲了PCA的光譜結構和穩定性。我們提出了\emph{測地線切空間聚合PCA（GTSA-PCA）}，這是一種PCA的幾何擴展，將曲率感知和測地線一致性整合在統一的光譜框架內。我們的方法用定義在$k$-最近鄰圖上的曲率加權局部協方差算子替代全局協方差算子，從而產生適應流形的局部切空間，同時抑制高曲率失真。我們接著引入一個測地線對齊算子，將內在圖距離與子空間親和性結合，以全局同步這些局部表示。結果算子允許一個光譜分解，其主導成分定義了一個感知幾何的嵌入。我們進一步整合半監督信息來指導對齊，改善了在最小監督下的區分結構。在真實數據集上的實驗顯示，GTSA-PCA在小樣本大小和高曲率範疇中，對PCA、核PCA、監督PCA和強圖基準（如UMAP）有一致的改進。我們的結果將GTSA-PCA定位為統計和幾何方法之間的原則性橋樑，以進行降維。
2604.18816.author: Alexandre L. M. Levada et.al.
